workflow_rationale: Multi-service feature requiring database models, backend APIs, and frontend UI components. Builds on existing defects infrastructure to add spatial visualization.

phases.name: Database Models & Migration
phases.description: Create floorplan and pin data models with migration

subtasks.description: Create Floorplan model for storing floorplan metadata

verification.command: python -c "from backend.app.models.floorplan import Floorplan, FloorplanPin; print('OK')"

subtasks.activeForm: Creating Floorplan model for storing floorplan metadata
subtasks.notes: Created Floorplan and FloorplanPin models following established patterns. Models include project_id, floor_number, file_id for Floorplan; and floorplan_id, entity_type, entity_id, x/y positions for FloorplanPin. Verification passed successfully.

subtasks.description: Create Alembic migration for floorplans and pins tables
subtasks.activeForm: Creating Alembic migration for floorplans and pins tables
subtasks.notes: Created migration 062_add_floorplans_and_pins.py following the pattern from 025_add_defects.py. Migration includes floorplans table with project_id, floor_number, name, file_id, version, is_active, timestamps, and indexes. Also includes floorplan_pins table with floorplan_id, entity_type, entity_id, x/y positions, and appropriate indexes. All foreign keys and cascade rules properly configured. Syntax verification passed successfully.

phases.name: Backend Schemas
phases.description: Create Pydantic schemas for floorplan and pin requests/responses

subtasks.description: Create Pydantic schemas for floorplan CRUD

verification.command: python -c "from backend.app.schemas.floorplan import FloorplanCreate, FloorplanResponse, FloorplanPinCreate; print('OK')"

subtasks.activeForm: Creating Pydantic schemas for floorplan CRUD
subtasks.notes: Created Pydantic schemas for floorplan CRUD following the defect.py pattern. Includes FloorplanCreate, FloorplanUpdate, FloorplanResponse, FloorplanPinCreate, FloorplanPinUpdate, and FloorplanPinResponse schemas. All schemas use proper validation, sanitization, and CamelCase conversion for responses. Position fields are constrained to 0.0-1.0 normalized range. Verification passed successfully.

phases.name: Backend API Endpoints
phases.description: Build REST API endpoints for floorplan and pin management

subtasks.notes: Created backend/app/api/v1/floorplans.py with full CRUD endpoints following the patterns from defects.py and files.py. Includes GET (list), POST (create), GET (single), PUT (update), and DELETE endpoints. All endpoints include proper audit logging, permission checks, and localization. Updated router.py to include floorplans router. Python syntax verification passed successfully.

subtasks.description: Create pin creation and retrieval endpoints
subtasks.activeForm: Creating pin creation and retrieval endpoints
subtasks.notes: Created pin creation and retrieval endpoints in backend/app/api/v1/floorplans.py. Added GET endpoint to list all pins for a floorplan (with optional entity_type filter) and POST endpoint to create new pins. Included helper function verify_floorplan_exists to reduce code duplication. All endpoints include proper audit logging, permission checks, and localized error messages. File optimized to 300 lines exactly. Syntax verification passed successfully.

phases.name: Frontend TypeScript Types
phases.description: Define TypeScript interfaces for floorplan and pin data

subtasks.description: Create TypeScript types for floorplan and pins
subtasks.activeForm: Creating TypeScript types for floorplan and pins
subtasks.notes: Created TypeScript types for floorplan and pins following the pattern from index.ts. Includes Floorplan, FloorplanPin, FileBrief interfaces with proper camelCase field names matching the backend CamelCaseModel responses. Also includes request types for create and update operations. Type-check verification passed successfully.

phases.name: Frontend API Client
phases.description: Build API client functions for floorplan operations

subtasks.description: Create floorplan API client with CRUD methods
subtasks.activeForm: Creating floorplan API client with CRUD methods
subtasks.notes: Created frontend/src/api/floorplans.ts with full CRUD methods for floorplans and pins following patterns from defects.ts and files.ts. Includes list, get, create, update, delete for floorplans, and listPins, createPin for pins. TypeScript type-check verification passed successfully.

phases.name: Floorplan Canvas Component
phases.description: Build interactive floorplan viewer with Fabric.js

subtasks.description: Create FloorplanCanvas component with Fabric.js integration
subtasks.activeForm: Creating FloorplanCanvas component with Fabric.js integration
subtasks.notes: Created FloorplanCanvas component with Fabric.js integration following ImageAnnotator pattern. Component includes canvas initialization, responsive sizing, floorplan image loading from file URL, and proper loading/error states. Added Hebrew and English i18n translations. TypeScript type-check verification passed successfully.

subtasks.description: Create FloorplanPinOverlay component for pin rendering
subtasks.activeForm: Creating FloorplanPinOverlay component for pin rendering
subtasks.notes: Created FloorplanPinOverlay component following the pattern from DefectCardList. Component includes Fabric.js Circle rendering for pins, color-coded by defect status (red for open, yellow for in_progress, green for resolved, blue for closed). Implemented click handlers and entity status fetching via defectsApi. Pins render at normalized positions (0-1 range) on canvas. TypeScript type-check verification passed successfully.

Added click-to-create-defect interaction to FloorplanCanvas component. When users click on the canvas, the click position is captured (normalized to 0-1 range), the DefectFormModal opens, and upon saving the defect, a pin is automatically created at the clicked coordinates. Supports both single defect creation and multi-defect analysis via AI. TypeScript type-check verification passed successfully.

phases.name: Floorplan Viewer Page
phases.description: Build the main floorplan viewer page with layout and navigation

subtasks.description: Create FloorplanViewerPage with canvas and controls
subtasks.activeForm: Creating FloorplanViewerPage with canvas and controls
subtasks.notes: Created FloorplanViewerPage with canvas, zoom controls (zoom in/out, fit to screen), pan/drag functionality, and mobile-responsive design. Added route to App.tsx and necessary i18n translations for both Hebrew and English.

subtasks.description: Add floorplan upload flow to AreasPage or new upload page
subtasks.activeForm: Adding floorplan upload flow to AreasPage or new upload page
subtasks.notes: Implemented floorplan upload functionality in AreasPage with upload button, file input, validation, and success/error handling. Added translations for Hebrew and English.

phases.name: Pin Filtering & Controls
phases.description: Add filter panel for status, trade, priority, date filtering

subtasks.description: Create PinFilterPanel component with filter controls
subtasks.activeForm: Creating PinFilterPanel component with filter controls
subtasks.notes: Created PinFilterPanel component with filter controls including status chips, search field, and collapsible advanced filters (category, severity). Added all required Hebrew and English translations. Component is mobile-responsive and follows existing patterns from DefectsPage. TypeScript type-check passed successfully.

subtasks.description: Implement pin clustering for zoomed-out view
subtasks.activeForm: Implementing pin clustering for zoomed-out view
subtasks.notes: Implemented pin clustering for zoomed-out view. Pins cluster when zoom level is below 1.5x using distance-based clustering algorithm (50px threshold). Cluster markers show count with white text on larger circles (20px radius). Clusters automatically expand to individual pins when zooming in. TypeScript type-check verification passed successfully.

phases.name: Internationalization
phases.description: Add Hebrew and English translations for all new strings

subtasks.description: Add Hebrew translations for floorplan UI strings
subtasks.activeForm: Adding Hebrew translations for floorplan UI strings
subtasks.notes: Hebrew translations for floorplan UI strings were already added during previous subtask implementations (subtasks 6-1, 7-1, 7-2, and 8-1). All required translation keys verified present in he.json including: floorplans.title, subtitle, viewer, invalidParams, loadFailed, noImageUrl, imageLoadError, canvasError, filterByStatus, searchPins, advancedFilters. Translations committed in commit 3169ebe. TypeScript type-check verification passed successfully.

subtasks.description: Add English translations for floorplan UI strings
subtasks.activeForm: Adding English translations for floorplan UI strings
subtasks.notes: English translations for floorplan UI strings were already present in en.json. All required translation keys verified: floorplans.title, subtitle, viewer, invalidParams, loadFailed, noImageUrl, imageLoadError, canvasError, filterByStatus, searchPins, advancedFilters. Keys match perfectly with Hebrew translations. No modifications needed.

phases.name: End-to-End Integration
phases.description: Verify complete flow from upload to pin creation to defect viewing

subtasks.description: End-to-end test of floorplan upload and pin creation flow

steps: Upload a floorplan PDF for a floor
Click on canvas to create a defect
Verify pin appears on canvas with correct color
Filter by status and verify pin visibility
Click pin to view defect details

subtasks.activeForm: Running end-to-end test of floorplan upload and pin creation flow

parallel_groups.reason: Both depend only on phase-1, work on different services
Backend API and frontend API client can be built in parallel
Filters and i18n both depend on phase-7, different concerns

acceptance_criteria: All existing tests pass (backend pytest, frontend vitest)
New code has test coverage for critical paths
TypeScript type-check passes with no errors
Floorplan viewer renders correctly on mobile and desktop
Pin creation and filtering works end-to-end
verification_strategy.reasoning: Medium risk feature that extends existing defects system with new UI components. Requires integration testing to ensure pin positioning accuracy and Fabric.js compatibility.
